settings.text: Hand-tied bouquets and arrangements, available for pickup or local delivery.

settings.name: Classic Wrapped
settings.description: A timeless hand-tied bouquet of seasonal stems in soft, complementary tones.

settings.name: Garden Mix
settings.description: A lush, textured arrangement inspired by English cottage gardens. Abundant and overflowing.

settings.name: Seasonal Vase
settings.description: Our signature ceramic vase arrangement featuring the best of what’s currently in bloom.

settings.name: Petite Posy
settings.description: A small but perfectly formed bunch — ideal for a desk, bedside table, or a just-because gesture.

settings.name: Statement Arrangement
settings.description: A show-stopping centerpiece designed to fill a room. Premium stems, dramatic scale.

settings.name: Dried Bouquet
settings.description: Long-lasting dried flowers and grasses in warm, earthy palettes. No water needed.

settings.name: Greeting Card
settings.description: Handwritten card included with your delivery or pickup.

settings.name: Artisan Chocolates
settings.description: A box of locally made chocolates to accompany your flowers.

settings.name: Ceramic Vase Upgrade
settings.description: Swap the standard vessel for one of our handmade ceramic vases.

settings.name: Weekly Delivery Subscription
settings.description: Fresh flowers delivered to your door or business every week. Minimum 4-week commitment.

settings.text: Planning a wedding, corporate event, or special occasion? We create custom floral designs tailored to your vision, venue, and season. From bridal bouquets to full venue installations, every detail is handled with care.

settings.features:
+ Weddings & elopements
+ Corporate events
+ Dinner parties & private functions
+ Venue installations
+ Sympathy & memorial flowers

settings.title: Need Help?
settings.text:
(555) 247-3100
hello@petalry.co

We’re happy to help you choose the perfect arrangement.

settings.question: How do I place an order?
settings.answer: Call us, email, or stop by the shop. For same-day delivery, please order by 1pm. We’ll confirm availability and arrange delivery or pickup.

settings.question: Do you offer delivery?
settings.answer: Yes! We deliver within Asheville and surrounding areas. Delivery is $10 within city limits, $15 for outlying areas. Free delivery on orders over $75.

settings.question: Can I customize my bouquet?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Tell us your color preferences, occasion, and budget and we’ll create something bespoke. Custom orders need at least 24 hours notice.

settings.question: How far in advance should I order for weddings?
settings.answer: We recommend booking at least 3 months in advance for weddings. For smaller events, 2–4 weeks is usually enough.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: Because flowers are perishable, we don’t accept returns. If there’s an issue with your order, contact us within 24 hours and we’ll make it right.
